header.title: Welcome, {name}! 👋
header.subtitle: Let's get you started with organizing your first election or joining an organization

compliance.title: German GDPR Compliant
compliance.description: PublicDigit is built with German privacy standards in mind. All data is processed securely and transparently.

actions.title: What would you like to do?
actions.createOrgDesc: Start managing elections for your community, union, or organization
actions.joinOrgDesc: Get invited to participate in elections from existing organizations
actions.skipDesc: Skip setup and explore the dashboard first

german.title: German Organizations
german.description: Unions, works councils, and German associations use PublicDigit for secure, transparent voting.

diaspora.title: Diaspora Communities
diaspora.description: Diaspora associations across Europe organize elections in multiple languages with full transparency.

keyFeatures.title: Why Choose PublicDigit?
keyFeatures.subtitle: We bring enterprise-grade security to grassroots organizations

transparency.title: Complete Transparency
transparency.description: Every vote is verifiable. Every step is auditable. No surprises.

security.title: Bank-Grade Security
security.description: End-to-end encryption, German data centers, and BSI certification

multilingual.title: Truly Global
multilingual.description: Built for diaspora communities with 8+ language support out of the box

tips.title: Getting Started Tips
tips.tip1: Organizations can be set up in less than 5 minutes
tips.tip2: Invite unlimited members to participate in elections
tips.tip3: Access detailed analytics and audit trails for every election
